notable_excerpts: As the Bank advances its objectives, it also plays a role in driving the progress and economic development of the surrounding ecosystem.
We have completely revamped the way the SME funding is done in the bank.
We have a very strong analytics team, which is working on other user use cases.
Our Capital Adequacy Ratio is at 13.03%, without considering plough back of profits, and is well above the regulatory requirement.
The Bank continues to demonstrate industry-leading asset quality at this scale.
SBI continues to be the leader in all the risk-adjusted profitable lending and liability pools in India.

chain_of_thought: The transcript lacks environmental disclosures, has moderate social content focusing on community and SME support, and strong governance disclosures highlighting risk management and transparency.
